stories.headline: The questions left unanswered by the Mandelson files
stories.description: A second batch of files relating to Lord Mandelson's appointment as US ambassador has been released.

stories.headline: Cara Delevingne on sobriety and mental health inspiring her music
stories.description: The model and actress is now moving into the world of music, having released her first two songs.

stories.headline: Meta AI chatbot enabled hackers to access others' Instagram accounts
stories.description: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.

stories.headline: Maga influencer Melissa Rein Lively admits Bond Street assault
stories.description: Melissa Rein Lively accepted a caution, while an assault by beating charge against her was withdrawn.
